title: Keep infrastructure orchestration out of domain kits
body: Cloudflare tunnel spawning and live server process management belong in dedicated infrastructure kits/runners. ONNX and PeerJS domain kits should receive URLs/adapters, not own tunnel processes.

title: Make kit progress machine-readable
body: Every kit should have lifecycle state in kit.manifest.json and project state in .kitbuilder/projects/<kit-id>/kit.project.json so agents can advance work without guessing.
